title: DLL Schema
description: Schema for normalized Volatility dlllist output. Each object represents a single DLL loaded by a process.

pid.description: Process ID that loaded this DLL

base.description: Base address of the DLL in memory

size.description: Size of the DLL in bytes

path.description: Full path to the DLL on disk

load_count.description: Number of times the DLL has been loaded. Often unavailable in Volatility 3.

load_time.description: DLL load timestamp (ISO 8601). Often unavailable in Volatility 3.
